description: Fix client-server API contract mismatches in gameStore.ts: use correct camelCase field names from server responses, remove unnecessary JSON.parse calls on already-parsed objects, fix hotseat persistence response property name, and add saveSnapshot call to doLotoChooseActualMandate.
steps: Fix loadReplayGame to use snapshotIndex instead of snapshot_index, state (already parsed) instead of state_json with JSON.parse, and game.players instead of JSON.parse(game.players_json)
Fix resumeGame to use lastSnapshot.state (already parsed) instead of JSON.parse(lastSnapshot.state_json)
Fix createGame hotseat persistence to check data.id instead of data.gameId
Add saveSnapshot call after doLotoChooseActualMandate to improve replay coverage
acceptance_criteria: npm run build completes without TypeScript errors
loadReplayGame correctly maps snapshotIndex and uses pre-parsed state from API response
resumeGame uses pre-parsed state from API response without JSON.parse
createGame correctly reads data.id from save-hotseat response to set persistentGameId
doLotoChooseActualMandate calls saveSnapshot at the end
verification: Run npm run build and confirm it passes with no errors
